cornucopia_supply_run.description: A tribute makes a daring run for Cornucopia supplies
cornucopia_supply_run.narrative: {tribute1} steels their nerves and makes a desperate dash for the Cornucopia. The golden horn gleams with promise - weapons, food, medicine - but also death.

fatigue.description: The sprint to the Cornucopia is exhausting

winner_effects.description: Successfully claims valuable supplies from the Cornucopia

cornucopia_hesitation.description: A tribute hesitates at the edge of the Cornucopia clearing
cornucopia_hesitation.narrative: {tribute1} stands at the tree line, watching the Cornucopia. The supplies are so close, yet the danger is palpable. Every instinct screams both 'run' and 'grab everything'.

sanity.description: The difficult decision weighs on the mind

cornucopia_inventory_revealed.description: The Cornucopia's deadly treasures are revealed
cornucopia_inventory_revealed.narrative: Sunlight glints off the weapons scattered around the golden horn - swords, spears, knives, and packs filled with survival gear. Death and life intertwined in a cruel display.

mysterious_fog.description: A mysterious fog rolls into the arena
mysterious_fog.narrative: The arena comes alive as a mysterious fog rolls into the arena. The tributes must adapt to this new challenge.

sanity.description: The eerie fog unsettles the mind

fog_blindness.description: Reduced visibility makes it harder to spot threats

ground_shake.description: The ground begins to shake violently
ground_shake.narrative: The arena trembles as violent earthquakes shake the ground. Tributes scramble for safety as the earth itself rebels.

health.description: Falling debris and unstable ground cause injuries

fatigue.description: The constant shaking exhausts the tributes

temperature_drop.narrative: A supernatural cold descends upon the arena. Frost forms on the ground as tributes shiver in the unnatural chill.

fatigue.description: The cold saps energy and causes shivering

sanity.description: The unnatural cold disturbs the mind

blood_rain.description: Blood rain begins to fall from the sky
blood_rain.narrative: The sky weeps blood as crimson droplets fall from above. The tributes are drenched in the macabre precipitation.

sanity.description: The horrifying blood rain terrifies the tributes

health.description: The acidic blood causes minor burns

cornucopia_weapon_duel.description: Two tributes fight over a weapon at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_weapon_duel.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} both lunge for the same gleaming sword lying at the base of the Cornucopia. Their hands collide, and what was a race becomes a vicious hand-to-hand brawl for the deadly prize.

health.description: Brutal injuries from the desperate fight

winner_effects.description: Claims the weapon after defeating their opponent

cornucopia_backstab.description: A tribute betrays another at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_backstab.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} grab supplies side by side at the Cornucopia, when suddenly {tribute1} turns and drives a knife into {tribute2}'s back. The betrayal is swift and merciless.

winner_effects.description: Takes everything from the betrayed tribute

cornucopia_pack_grab.description: A tribute snatches a backpack and runs
cornucopia_pack_grab.narrative: {tribute1} makes a lightning-fast grab for a bright orange backpack at the Cornucopia's mouth, snatching it up without breaking stride. {tribute2} lunges to intercept but misses by inches as {tribute1} sprints away into the trees.

winner_effects.description: Successfully escapes with valuable supplies

cornucopia_triple_clash.description: Three tributes collide in a deadly melee
cornucopia_triple_clash.narrative: {tribute1}, {tribute2}, and {tribute3} meet in the center of the Cornucopia in an explosion of violence. Fists fly, weapons clash, and blood sprays across the golden metal as each fights desperately for their life.

health.description: Severe wounds from the three-way battle

fatigue.description: Completely exhausted from the brutal fight

winner_effects.description: Emerges victorious from the deadly clash

cornucopia_throat_slash.description: A brutal execution at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_throat_slash.narrative: {tribute1} catches {tribute2} from behind at the Cornucopia, pulling their head back and drawing a blade across their throat in one smooth, practiced motion. {tribute2} crumples without a sound.

cornucopia_medicine_fight.description: Two tributes battle over medical supplies
cornucopia_medicine_fight.narrative: {tribute1} spots a first aid kit at the same moment as {tribute2}. They collide violently, each knowing that medicine could mean the difference between survival and bleeding out in the arena.

winner_effects.description: Claims the precious medical supplies

cornucopia_spear_throw.description: A tribute hurls a spear at another
cornucopia_spear_throw.narrative: {tribute1} grabs a spear from the Cornucopia and hurls it with deadly accuracy at {tribute2}, who is frantically gathering supplies. The spear flies true, catching {tribute2} in the chest.

winner_effects.description: Eliminates a threat from range

cornucopia_tackle_kill.description: A tribute tackles another to the ground
cornucopia_tackle_kill.narrative: {tribute1} tackles {tribute2} to the ground just steps from the Cornucopia. They roll through the dirt in a brutal struggle until {tribute1} gets their hands around {tribute2}'s throat and squeezes with murderous intent.

fatigue.description: Exhausted from the brutal ground fight

cornucopia_axe_ambush.description: A tribute ambushes another with an axe
cornucopia_axe_ambush.narrative: {tribute1} snatches up a wicked-looking axe and immediately turns on {tribute2}, who is bent over a crate of supplies. The axe swings down with terrible force, catching {tribute2} completely by surprise.

winner_effects.description: Armed and dangerous

cornucopia_double_team.description: Two tributes gang up on a third
cornucopia_double_team.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} exchange a quick glance before simultaneously attacking {tribute3} at the Cornucopia. Outnumbered and overwhelmed, {tribute3} fights desperately against the coordinated assault.

winner_effects.description: The team splits the spoils

cornucopia_knife_fight.description: A vicious knife fight breaks out
cornucopia_knife_fight.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} both grab knives from the Cornucopia and circle each other warily. Then, as if on signal, they lunge forward in a whirlwind of slashing blades and desperate parries.

fatigue.description: Completely drained from the intense duel

winner_effects.description: Proves superior with the blade

cornucopia_battle.description: Three specific tributes clash at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_battle.narrative: The golden horn becomes a battleground as {tribute1}, {tribute2}, and {tribute3} converge on the precious supplies within. Blood spills on the metal as they fight desperately for resources that could mean survival.

health.description: Severe injuries from the brutal Cornucopia melee

fatigue.description: The frenzied battle exhausts all participants

winner_effects.description: Victor claims valuable supplies from the Cornucopia

cornucopia_bloodbath.description: Four tributes clash in a massive Cornucopia melee
cornucopia_bloodbath.narrative: The Cornucopia erupts into pure chaos as {tribute1}, {tribute2}, {tribute3}, and {tribute4} all converge on the golden horn at once. Weapons clash, blood sprays, and screams echo as they fight for survival and supplies in the opening bloodbath.

winner_effects.description: Survivors grab what they can from the carnage

fierce_combat.description: Two tributes engage in fierce combat
fierce_combat.narrative: The arena echoes with the clash of weapons as {tribute1} and {tribute2} engage in a brutal confrontation. Blood and sweat fly as they fight for survival in this deadly dance.

health.description: Combat wounds and injuries from the fight

fatigue.description: The intense physical exertion exhausts the combatants

winner_effects.description: Winner claims a weapon from the defeated tribute

ambush_attack.description: A tribute ambushes another from hiding
ambush_attack.narrative: From the shadows strikes {tribute1}, catching {tribute2} completely off guard in a deadly ambush. The element of surprise could mean the difference between life and death.

winner_effects.description: Ambusher claims weapons and supplies from the victim

weapon_discovery.description: A weapon is discovered and claimed
weapon_discovery.narrative: {tribute1} stumbles upon a cache of weapons hidden in the arena. With this newfound arsenal, their chances of survival have dramatically improved.

winner_effects.description: Tribute discovers and claims a powerful weapon

great_height_fall.description: A tribute falls from a great height
great_height_fall.narrative: A tribute loses their footing and plunges from a great height. The impact with the ground is brutal and unforgiving.

fatigue.description: The fall leaves the tribute disoriented and exhausted

poisonous_berries.description: Poisonous berries are found and consumed
poisonous_berries.narrative: The arena comes alive as poisonous berries are found and consumed. The tributes must adapt to this new challenge.

sanity.description: The realization of poisoning causes panic

rest_and_recover.description: Tributes rest and recover their strength
rest_and_recover.narrative: The tributes take a moment to rest and recover their strength. In the brutal arena, even brief respite is precious.

clean_water_found.description: A tribute finds a source of clean water
clean_water_found.narrative: A tribute discovers a precious source of clean water. In the arid arena, this find could mean the difference between life and death.

winner_effects.description: Tribute secures water supplies for future use

merciless_sun.narrative: The sun beats down mercilessly on the arena. The heat is oppressive, sapping strength and will from the tributes.

night_falls.narrative: Night falls upon the arena, bringing welcome relief from the heat. The darkness brings both respite and new dangers.

fatigue.description: Cool night air allows better rest

sanity.description: Darkness and isolation affect mental state

successful_hunt.description: A tribute successfully hunts for food
successful_hunt.narrative: A tribute demonstrates their hunting prowess, securing precious food in the unforgiving arena.

winner_effects.description: Tribute gains food supplies for future meals

dramatic_sunset.description: A dramatic sunset paints the sky
dramatic_sunset.narrative: As the sun dips below the horizon, it paints the arena sky in brilliant hues of crimson and gold. For a moment, the brutality of the Games seems almost beautiful.

sanity.description: The beauty of the sunset provides momentary peace

crowd_silence.description: An eerie silence falls over the arena
crowd_silence.narrative: The arena falls deathly silent, broken only by the distant calls of unseen creatures. The tributes feel the weight of isolation in this artificial wilderness.

sanity.description: The oppressive silence heightens feelings of isolation

distant_explosion.description: A distant explosion echoes through the arena
distant_explosion.narrative: A muffled explosion echoes from somewhere in the distance, reminding everyone that the Gamemakers control their fate. The ground vibrates slightly beneath their feet.

sanity.description: The reminder of Gamemaker power unsettles the tributes

sponsor_gift.description: A sponsor gift arrives from the Capitol
sponsor_gift.narrative: The Gamemakers favor a tribute with a sponsor gift from the Capitol. Luxury and supplies arrive from above.

winner_effects.description: Tribute receives valuable supplies from sponsor

rule_change.description: The Gamemakers announce a rule change
rule_change.narrative: The Gamemakers announce a rule change, altering the dynamics of the Games. Tributes must adapt to the new reality.

sanity.description: Rule changes create uncertainty and fear

medical_supplies.narrative: Medical supplies arrive for a tribute, offering hope in the face of injury and illness.

winner_effects.description: Tribute gains medical supplies for treatment

cornucopia_restocks.narrative: The Cornucopia mysteriously restocks with fresh supplies. Tributes must decide whether to risk the dangerous dash for resources.

arena_effects.description: Supplies become available at the Cornucopia

alliance_formation.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} form a tentative alliance, combining their strengths in the fight for survival.

cornucopia_grab_and_run_alliance.description: Two tributes team up at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_grab_and_run_alliance.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} lock eyes across the Cornucopia and nod in silent agreement. They grab supplies together, watching each other's backs as they sprint away from the bloodbath as unlikely allies.

sanity.description: Finding an ally in the chaos boosts morale

winner_effects.description: Both tributes escape with supplies

cornucopia_district_alliance.description: District partners team up at Cornucopia
cornucopia_district_alliance.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2}, both from the same district, find each other in the chaos of the Cornucopia. Without words, years of training together take over as they work in perfect coordination to secure supplies.

sanity.description: Reuniting with district partner provides comfort

winner_effects.description: Coordinated teamwork secures better supplies

cornucopia_protection_pact.description: One tribute saves another at the Cornucopia
cornucopia_protection_pact.narrative: {tribute1} is about to be struck down when {tribute2} tackles the attacker from the side. 'We stick together,' {tribute2} pants, extending a bloodied hand. {tribute1} takes it without hesitation.

sanity.description: Grateful to be alive and not alone

fled_tributes_meet_woods.description: Two tributes who fled meet in the woods
fled_tributes_meet_woods.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2}, both having fled the Cornucopia, nearly collide in the dense forest. After a tense moment, they lower their guards. 'Safety in numbers?' {tribute1} suggests. {tribute2} nods warily.

sanity.description: Relief at finding a potential ally

fled_tributes_district_reunion.narrative: {tribute1} hears movement and whirls around, only to see {tribute2}, their district partner, emerging from the brush. Relief floods through both of them. They survived the bloodbath, and now they're not alone.

sanity.description: Immense relief at finding their partner alive

fled_tributes_mutual_fear.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} are both shaking as they hide in a hollow log, having fled the Cornucopia empty-handed. 'We have to work together,' {tribute1} whispers. 'It's the only way we survive.' {tribute2} agrees with a terrified nod.

sanity.description: Slightly comforted by companionship despite fear

cornucopia_coordinated_grab.description: Two tributes coordinate their supply grab
cornucopia_coordinated_grab.narrative: {tribute1} and {tribute2} exchange a rapid series of hand signals at the edge of the Cornucopia. On an unspoken count, they move as one - {tribute1} grabs weapons while {tribute2} secures food and medicine. They vanish into the trees together within seconds.

winner_effects.description: Perfect coordination yields excellent supplies

multi_tribute_encounter.narrative: Multiple tributes converge in the same area. Alliances could form, or chaos could erupt - the next moments will determine their fates.

sanity.description: Tension of potential confrontation affects mental state
